signatures.name: Adafruit IO Key
signatures.note: Requires context due to 32-char hex being too broad for standalone detection

signatures.name: Adobe Client Secret
signatures.note: UNVERIFIED: No documented prefix - standard OAuth client secrets

signatures.name: Airtable API Key
signatures.note: Made context-aware due to false positives matching common 'key' + 17 chars patterns like 'keysNotRemovedFromDb'

signatures.name: Alibaba Access Key ID
signatures.note: LTAI + 12-20 chars (16-24 total)

signatures.name: Apify API Key
signatures.note: UNVERIFIED: No prefix documented in official Apify docs

signatures.name: Asana Personal Token
signatures.note: Officially opaque and subject to change - broad pattern for context-based detection

signatures.name: Bitly Secret Key
signatures.note: Reverted to R_ prefix pattern; broad 40-char hex removed due to false positives

signatures.name: Contentful Personal Access Token
signatures.note: Removed broad pattern due to false positives (e.g., DisableExtensionPoints)

signatures.name: Datadog API Key
signatures.note: Removed standalone [a-f0-9]{23} pattern due to false positives

signatures.name: EasyPost API Key
signatures.note: UNVERIFIED: EZAK prefix not confirmed in official documentation

signatures.name: Facebook Token EAA
signatures.note: Removed broad EAA pattern, keeping specific EAACEdEose0cBA format

signatures.name: Gitlab Runner Registration Token
signatures.note: Deprecated GR1348941 format and modern glrt- prefix

signatures.name: Heroku API Key
signatures.note: Requires key/api/auth/token keyword near heroku to avoid JSON domain false positives

signatures.name: Infura API Key
signatures.note: Removed standalone [a-fA-F0-9]{30} pattern due to false positives

signatures.name: LinkedIn Secret Key
signatures.note: Variable length with mixed case and special characters

signatures.name: NuGet API Key
signatures.note: Made context-aware due to GUID format being too broad for standalone detection

signatures.name: Okta API Token
signatures.note: Made context-aware due to 00 prefix being too broad for standalone detection

signatures.name: Plaid Secret
signatures.note: Removed standalone 64-char hex pattern due to false positives

signatures.name: Facebook Extended Token (EAAAE)
signatures.note: Facebook token format, not Square

signatures.name: Stripe Test Key
signatures.note: Variable length (24-99+ chars)

signatures.name: Stripe Live Key
signatures.note: Variable length (24-99+ chars)

signatures.name: Stripe Restricted Test Key
signatures.note: Variable length (24-99+ chars)

signatures.name: Stripe Restricted Live Key
signatures.note: Variable length (24-99+ chars)

signatures.name: Twitter Bearer Token
signatures.note: Made context-aware due to AAAAA... pattern being too broad for standalone detection

signatures.name: Amazon Cognito Client ID
signatures.note: Removed wildcards between cognito/client to prevent matching across large JSON blobs

signatures.name: Facebook Token EAAAE (Duplicate)
signatures.note: Facebook token format - duplicate entry

signatures.name: Twilio Auth Token
signatures.note: Removed standalone [a-fA-F0-9]{30} pattern due to false positives
